text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Flash, you look low-key exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
…I am, a bit. I had a lot of work come up
unexpectedly today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's rough. So you gonna skip
training today?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I will go ahead with it as planned.
If I reduce my practice, I will only suffer
for it later trying to rearrange my plans.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But, like, there's no point trying to overwork
yourself now. You should just relax and do
something fun!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, we can go out right now!
I'm a genius!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the offer, but I am not one to
implement dubious theories so hastily…

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just give it a try. Who knows, maybe
you'll grow stronger if you break out of that
mold of yours.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that got you interested, huh? Then how
about a full glam glow-up while we're at it?
My makeup skills are next level!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid I'll have to pass after all…
